traps.description: No lock: get/put mutate OrderedDict (move_to_end, popitem, __setitem__) without synchronisation. CPython's GIL does not make these compound operations atomic.
Eviction loop uses > capacity instead of >= capacity; cache grows one entry beyond limit before evicting.
capacity=0: eviction check (0 > 0) is false, so first put inserts an entry instead of being a no-op.
get() does not check TTL; expired entries are returned as if still valid. The starter stores inserted_at but never compares it to time.monotonic() - ttl.
